final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a steampunk mechanical device.

Style/medium: needs a "蒸汽朋克" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Jules Verne illustrated editions, Victorian-era scientific instrument catalogues, 1980s-1990s steampunk concept art (e.g., The Difference Engine aesthetic); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include complex gears, pipes, and gauges as the focal mechanical elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a "精密而复古的工业美感" atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brass and copper dominant direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a Victorian-era decorative surface treatment with brass and copper materials — exact grain / sheen / patina is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include Victorian-era decorative elements
Avoid:
